Using `selectFrom(LINK)` fetches all columns from the LINK table, which may retrieve unnecessary data and reduce query performance. Consider explicitly selecting only the columns needed for the LinkDto class, e.g., `dslContext.select(LINK.URL_ID, LINK.URL, ...).from(LINK)`.
